# browser-history-analyzer

> **Daily Build** | 2026-06-13

## Description
Parse Chrome history SQLite DB and visualize top sites + time patterns

## Stack
Python, sqlite3, pandas, matplotlib

## Setup
```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
python main.py
```
